'''鈭歷-ch-k''' ('''vachaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiberize|fiberize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiberize|fiberize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-ch-k
|-
! Lemma
| vachaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vachakithi|vachakithi]] || [[word:vachakiji|vachakiji]] || [[word:vachakishi|vachakishi]] || [[word:vachaki|vachaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachakuthuth|vachakuthuth]] || [[word:vachakujuj|vachakujuj]] || [[word:vachakushush|vachakushush]] || [[word:vachak|vachak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachakuthu|vachakuthu]] || [[word:vachakuju|vachakuju]] || [[word:vachakushu|vachakushu]] || [[word:vachaku|vachaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachakufuth|vachakufuth]] || [[word:vachakufuj|vachakufuj]] || [[word:vachakufush|vachakufush]] || [[word:vachakuf|vachakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vachakethe|vachakethe]] || [[word:vachakeje|vachakeje]] || [[word:vachakeshe|vachakeshe]] || [[word:vachake|vachake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachakothoth|vachakothoth]] || [[word:vachakojoj|vachakojoj]] || [[word:vachakoshosh|vachakoshosh]] || [[word:vachak|vachak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachakotho|vachakotho]] || [[word:vachakojo|vachakojo]] || [[word:vachakosho|vachakosho]] || [[word:vachako|vachako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachakofoth|vachakofoth]] || [[word:vachakofoj|vachakofoj]] || [[word:vachakofosh|vachakofosh]] || [[word:vachakof|vachakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vachak忙th忙|vachak忙th忙]] || [[word:vachak忙j忙|vachak忙j忙]] || [[word:vachak忙sh忙|vachak忙sh忙]] || [[word:vachak忙|vachak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachakathath|vachakathath]] || [[word:vachakajaj|vachakajaj]] || [[word:vachakashash|vachakashash]] || [[word:vachak|vachak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachakatha|vachakatha]] || [[word:vachakaja|vachakaja]] || [[word:vachakasha|vachakasha]] || [[word:vachaka|vachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachakafath|vachakafath]] || [[word:vachakafaj|vachakafaj]] || [[word:vachakafash|vachakafash]] || [[word:vachakaf|vachakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vachakasha|vachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govachakasha|govachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivachakasha|gokivachakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vachakn眉sha|vachakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govachaknkn眉sha|govachaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivachakn眉sha|gokivachakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vachaksh毛sha|vachaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govachaknksh毛sha|govachaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivachaksh毛sha|gokivachaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachakrosha|vachakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachaknkrosha|govachaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachakrosha|gokivachakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vachakmusha|vachakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govachaknkmusha|govachaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachakmusha|gokivachakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vachaksherasha|vachaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govachaknksherasha|govachaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivachaksherasha|gokivachaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vachakngasha|vachakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govachaknkngasha|govachaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivachakngasha|gokivachakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vachakyasha|vachakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govachaknkyasha|govachaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivachakyasha|gokivachakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vachakyamasha|vachakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govachaknkyamasha|govachaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivachakyamasha|gokivachakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vachakn眉sh毛sha|vachakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govachaknkn眉sh毛sha|govachaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivachakn眉sh毛sha|gokivachakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachakn眉rosha|vachakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachaknkn眉rosha|govachaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachakn眉rosha|gokivachakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachakn眉musha|vachakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachaknkn眉musha|govachaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachakn眉musha|gokivachakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vachaksh毛n眉sha|vachaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govachaknksh毛n眉sha|govachaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivachaksh毛n眉sha|gokivachaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachaksh毛rosha|vachaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachaknksh毛rosha|govachaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachaksh毛rosha|gokivachaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachaksh毛musha|vachaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachaknksh毛musha|govachaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachaksh毛musha|gokivachaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vachakron眉sha|vachakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govachaknkron眉sha|govachaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivachakron眉sha|gokivachakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vachakrosh毛sha|vachakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govachaknkrosh毛sha|govachaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivachakrosh毛sha|gokivachakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachakromusha|vachakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachaknkromusha|govachaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachakromusha|gokivachakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vachakmun眉sha|vachakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govachaknkmun眉sha|govachaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivachakmun眉sha|gokivachakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vachakmush毛sha|vachakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govachaknkmush毛sha|govachaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivachakmush毛sha|gokivachakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vachakmurosha|vachakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govachaknkmurosha|govachaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivachakmurosha|gokivachakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vachak|vachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙ch忙k|v忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovachak|hovachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙ch忙k|hov忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovachak|hohovachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙ch忙k|hohov忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vachak|n眉vachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙ch忙k|n眉v忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vachak|n眉n眉vachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙ch忙k|n眉n眉v忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vachak|n茂vachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙ch忙k|n茂v忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vachak|n茂n茂vachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙ch忙k|n茂n茂v忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvachak|luvachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙ch忙k|luv忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvachak|luluvachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙ch忙k|luluv忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livachak|livachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙ch忙k|liv忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivachak|lilivachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙ch忙k|liliv忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovachak|kovachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙ch忙k|kov忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovachak|kokovachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙ch忙k|kokov忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevachak|kevachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙ch忙k|kev忙ch忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevachak|kekevachak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙ch忙k|kekev忙ch忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
